message:
feat(output): add rich_theme bridge layer for rich_rust integration

Add RichThemeExt trait that maps dcg's existing ratatui-based Theme
system to rich_rust's Style system, enabling gradual migration without
breaking existing code. Includes:

- color_to_markup() for ratatui Color to rich_rust markup conversion
- Severity-aware markup generation (badges, panel titles)
- Border style mapping to rich_rust box types
- Comprehensive test coverage for all mappings

This completes the theme infrastructure needed for P1.3+ tasks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
